title: SQL Mission 1: Customer Orders With INNER JOIN

initialState.content:
-- Mission Guidelines:
-- Tables:
--   customers(customer_id, name, region)
--   orders(order_id, customer_id, order_date, total_amount)
-- Goal:
--   Return customer name with order_id for existing orders only
-- Requirements:
--   Use INNER JOIN with an explicit ON condition
--   Sort by order_id ascending

SELECT c.name, o.order_id
FROM customers c
INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
ORDER BY o.order_id;
